evals.prompt: Plan E2E task for Feature 005 User CRUD — frontend task-015 includes data-testid contract.
evals.expected_output: Agent generates E2E task with device paths, RBAC URL scenarios, depends on task-015.

evals.prompt: Generate Cypress task for login feature but frontend task has no testid contract.
evals.expected_output: Agent blocks and requests frontend task update before proceeding.

evals.prompt: E2E planning for staff-only reports module with menu and direct URL protection.
evals.expected_output: Agent includes RBAC scenarios for hidden menu and cy.visit direct URL denial.
